description: Agent run fails because client config doesn't exist
fix: Run the setup wizard: say 'set me up' to populate CLIENT_CONFIG.md

description: Template placeholder {{ not replaced in client deliverable
fix: Check CLIENT_CONFIG.md — a field is likely empty. Re-run setup or manually populate the missing field.

description: Content sounds generic because voice preset was not applied
trigger: Generated content does not match brand voice
fix: Check CLIENT_CONFIG.md Voice Preset field. If empty, re-run setup. If set, verify the preset file exists in config/voice-presets/.

description: Recommendations are generic because niche preset was not loaded
fix: Check CLIENT_CONFIG.md Niche Preset field. If empty, re-run setup.

description: Dashboard shows no data because localStorage was cleared
fix: Ask the user to interact with the AI first (morning briefing, revenue check) to populate state, then refresh the dashboard.

description: GHL operations fail because API key not configured
trigger: GoHighLevel operations return errors or 'not connected'
fix: Check CLIENT_CONFIG.md — GoHighLevel should show an API key. If 'not connected', re-run setup or manually add the key.
